note: Per-field fill-value guidance (value type, required-ness, choice-group conditionals). Derived offline from schema/mapping/constraints; consistent with the fill engine. Not legal advice — verify against the official form before filing. Currency/time guidance is conservative because the printed '$'/AM-PM are not read here.

conditional.note: The form says '“X” the court for filing' — exactly one court box.

superior_court.guidance: A checkbox: filled with 'X' only when the fact is explicitly true; never auto-checked.

conditional.note: The form says '“X” the court for filing' — exactly one court box.

district_court.guidance: A checkbox: filled with 'X' only when the fact is explicitly true; never auto-checked.

unified_criminal_docket.guidance: A checkbox: filled with 'X' only when the fact is explicitly true; never auto-checked.

county.guidance: A Maine county name without the word 'County' (e.g. Cumberland).

location_town.guidance: The court division / town where the case is filed.

surety_s_name.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

city_town_of_residence.guidance: A city or town name only (no state or ZIP).

county_of_residence.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

state_of_residence.guidance: A US state — 'Maine' or the 2-letter 'ME'; match the box width.

town_of_real_estate.guidance: A city or town name only (no state or ZIP).

street_address_of_real_estate.guidance: A street address; include the street line. City/State/ZIP may belong in their own boxes — check the printed labels.

county_maine_and_i_grant_to_the_state_of.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

of_2.guidance: A dollar amount as digits (e.g. 1,250.00). Many forms pre-print '$' next to the blank; if so, do NOT type a second '$' (the engine strips a leading '$'). Verify against the form.

dollars.guidance: A dollar amount as digits (e.g. 1,250.00). Many forms pre-print '$' next to the blank; if so, do NOT type a second '$' (the engine strips a leading '$'). Verify against the form.

given_for_the_release_of_defendant.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

who_iswas_being_held_in_custody_for_the_.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

which_bail_is_returnable_to_the_unified_.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

undefined.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

divisioncounty_in_citytown.guidance: A city or town name only (no state or ZIP).

1.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.
